text.title: Mobile Performance Budget Examples
text.summary: Worked example: set budget for / and /product/[slug] routes on a Gatsby commerce site.

example.context: Gatsby 5 SSR site; routes / (landing), /product/[slug] (image-heavy), /checkout (interaction-heavy). Current Lighthouse mobile: / LCP=3.2s, /product LCP=4.1s, /checkout INP=420ms.
example.walk: Step 1: baseline measured. Step 2: budgets — / {LCP:2500, INP:200, CLS:0.1, transfer:1200, js_gz:150}; /product {LCP:2500, INP:200, CLS:0.1, transfer:1500, js_gz:180, image:900}; /checkout {LCP:2200, INP:150, CLS:0.05, transfer:900, js_gz:120}. Step 3: lighthouse-ci action with budgets.json; required status check. Step 4: /docs/perf-budget.md committed. Step 5: quarterly review scheduled.
example.output: PR adding 80KB JS to /checkout blocked; rationale-or-revert workflow established; CrUX mobile p75 LCP 3.2s → 2.3s within 2 sprints.
